text.tspan: RZN uses the lightest path that works, then drops into CDP only for hard cases.

text.font-family: SFMono-Regular, ui-monospace, Cascadia Mono, Liberation Mono, monospace
text.tspan: Escalation triggers: cross-origin iframes, trusted input, stubborn UI.
